name: Azur Lane Roleplay
description:
this is basically the same bot as my old one, but I tweaked the lorebook. for this character, the keys (characters) aren't always included, so this basically makes it possible for every character to be well defined, but you have to mention the character explicitly for their key to be activated.
leave comments and stuff
